title: Jae Juun
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Jae Juun |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]] *[[Killik/Legends|Killik]] {{C|Formerly}} *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You haven't heard of the XR-eight-oh-eight-g?''"
"''Should we have?''"
"''Not if I've been doing my job.|Jae and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''}} '''Jae Juun''' was the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] pilot of the [[XR808g]], and later the [[DR919a]], and a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. His copilot was a feisty and unfriendly [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] named [[Tarfang]]. ==Biography== Juun was enamored with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and based all of his strategies as a smuggler upon Solo's legendary adventures. However, upon meeting Solo at the [[Lizil (Hive)|Lizil]] [[Lizil|nest]], Juun altered his opinion after Solo and his friends attempted to coerce Juun into helping them discover the whereabouts of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that disappeared into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. Nevertheless, Juun held Solo in high esteem, although his obsession with proper procedure and protocol brought him into conflict a number of times with Solo, who often used unorthodox means to outwit his enemies. Juun was a great fan of historical holovids on Solo, and made many references to them while in his company. Juun was not technically adept, nearly killing himself and others when activating a poorly soldered circuit panel aboard his ship. After the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] resettled in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]], Juun and Tarfang procured jobs delivering [[spinglass]] sculptures for the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]]. Little did they know, however, that the sculptures secreted tiny [[Gorog]] assassin bugs, which were let loose aboard Alliance warships. A year later, Jae and Tarfang again encountered Han and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] when they were captured by the [[Saras]] nest. Juun helped them escape, and accompanied the Alliance heroes as they launched a mission to track down [[Lomi Plo]]. When they finally encountered the [[Night Herald]], Juun proved to be the only one who could see her. With Juun acting as his "eyes", Luke fought Plo, though both survived the battle. Following the battle, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] offered both Juun and Tarfang lucrative contracts working for [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service|Galactic Alliance Intelligence]]. Juun read [[Kyle Katarn]]'s ''[[Spy Primer]]'' as part of his training, considering it an orthodox intelligence manual (unaware that Katarn's career had been anything but orthodox). The pair would later be encountered by the Solos at the Lizil nest. Tarfang and Juun apparently were watching Killik movements while disguised as [[Fefze]] beetles. ===Second Galactic Civil War=== During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Juun and Tarfang were still working for the GA. This time they were on Kashyyyk sent to monitor the Wookiees who were currently deliberating on whether to support the GA or not. There Juun and Tarfang saw the Solos who had a warrant out for the arrest so they tried to stop the Solos from talking to the Wookiees which they succeeded at by bringing up the law. This however did not work the second time and the Wookiees allowed Leia to talk but Tarfang stepped in to challenge her, while Juun watched. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' *''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jae Juun |pl=Jae Juun }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Juun, Jae}} [[Category:Galactic Alliance Intelligence personnel]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Smugglers]] [[Category:Sullustans]]
